positive: Central composition, intricate mandala style of bioluminescent fantasy foliage and abstract celestial constellations. The flora should exhibit clean, stylized silhouettes with glowing, neon-teal and magenta bioluminescence against a deep indigo midnight blue background. Emphasize clean vector lines, high contrast, glowing edges, and a whimsical, otherworldly feel. Art Deco, digital illustration, smooth gradients, symmetrical pattern, perfect for seamless apparel printing, flat graphic design.
